feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Now what?
entry.content: > sudden IPO rush > Fabble 5 was a nothing burger, despite being larger > diminishing returns point reached, no more new data, hardware doesn't scale horizontally anymore, bigger models too slow > still not profitable long term > each new model iteration gets more hallucinations % > AHI (Artificial Habsburg Intelligence) is already here > no real improvement since sonnet 3.5 release in 2024, besides benchmaxing > plagiarized harness scripts and MCP trash from random public github repos (LMAO) ar

entry.title: /g/ Technology: its easier to deal with an old laptop
entry.content: if you want to try "obscure" hardware, that is obscure due to being too old not really supported anymore, laptops is the best bet year 2000 IBM laptop: -S3 GPU (whole company is no longer around) -Pentium 3 CPU (doesnt support modern CPU instructions, modern Linux is a no go, OpenBSD works) -IDE HDD controller, non-SATA now try to find P3, S3, stuff as a desktop? 404, not found.

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /hdgg/ - Human Domestication Guide General, 216th Bloom
entry.content: General for discussion of Human Domestication Guide & related fiction. i warned you about stairs bro edition >What is HDG? HDG is a collective kink writing project about the Affini (an advanced precursor civilization from outer space), who aggressively care for every other species in the universe. They have finally turned their glittery eyes on future grimderp hypercapitalist nightmare humanity. Using their natural charisma and various classes of Xenodrugs, they aim to make Florets (d̶o̶c̶i̶l̶e̶

A thread for prompters, editors, requesters, gooners, AI pornmommies, PLAPpers, Stable Diffusion directors, NovelAI artists—anything and everything AIslop. No limits past site rules; use Catbox galleries and uploads if needed. Keep dumps to a minimum and don't be a derailing cunt, thanks. entry.title: /g/ Technology: In discussions about adblocks, people always refute the fact that using adblock …
entry.content: In discussions about adblocks, people always refute the fact that using adblock is unethical for many reasons Yes, ads, data mining, surveillance, and else that the modern web is doing is also unethical or downright illegal but that doesn't suddenly makes leeching ethical. Both statement can be correct at the same time If you stole from a thief you are still a thief, and that is okay if the theif is a piece of shit (YOU) need to accept the fact that (1) adblocks are unethical and (2) doing uneth

entry.title: /mu/ Music: "He come to me with money in his hand! He offered me, I didn't ask him, I wasn't…
entry.content: "He come to me with money in his hand! He offered me, I didn't ask him, I wasn't knocking someone's door down, I was running from that! When I got out, I was in that... I had the studio, I went to Vox Studios. I had it all, and I looked at it and said, 'This is a bigger jail than I just got out of.' I don't want to take my time going to work, I got a motorcycle and a sleeping bag and ten or fifteen girls! What the hell I wanna go off into – and go to work for? Work for what, money? I got all the

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Any recommendations (old and recent releases) for gameplay first games? I think …
entry.content: Any recommendations (old and recent releases) for gameplay first games? I think the correct statement is "gameplay loop" instead of gameplay an open world game is prioritizing gameplay over story but you are just completing a list of chores and repeating side quests over and over just to pad playtime which gets old quickly

entry.title: /mu/ Music: >no rap, no house, no techno >only the occasional italo-disco and post-punk or t…
entry.content: >no rap, no house, no techno >only the occasional italo-disco and post-punk or tangerine dream >life is good I finally get it now: how incredibly reactionary and based synthwave is. It's not just nostalgia, it's a statement and it wants us to start again from there.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: /AltTWif/ - Alternate timeline what if thread
entry.content: We post alt history timeline ITT and discuss how the world would change by it. One important rule is you have to explain how such a scenario is possible and just say shit like "WhaT iF the AmIGa BEaT ThE PC As tHE DoMAnAnt pLaTFoRm!" I'll start, what if starting in 1997 DEC bought out SGI, Novell, SCO and the rights for Research UNIX from Lucent Technology, joined Project Monterey through the SCO purchase, sold the rights to MIPS, which they acquired from the SGI sale, to Intel instead of sellin
